controls.label: Pages Config
controls.description: Array of page objects with: id, label, title, subtitle, bg (color), accent, textColor, image (optional URL), imagePosition (optional), overlayOpacity (0-1, optional)

description: Fullscreen vertical page transitions with wheel/touch support. Click "Edit Pages" to customize content, colors, background images, and add/remove pages. Supports custom images with overlay opacity for text readability.
